summary: Comprehensive regression testing completed after homepage simplification. All backend APIs (17 endpoints) and frontend features tested successfully. Homepage carousel, navigation, responsive design, and backend integration all working correctly.

backend_issues.notes: All 17 backend API endpoints tested and working correctly. PDF download endpoint works with GET requests (returns 200).

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint (200)
Backend: Insights API - Get all insights (8 items returned)
Backend: Insights API - Filter by category
Backend: Insights API - Search functionality
Backend: Insights API - Get specific insight by ID/slug
Backend: Jobs API - Get all jobs (6 items returned)
Backend: Jobs API - Filter by location (Singapore: 2 jobs)
Backend: Jobs API - Filter by department (Trading: 2 jobs)
Backend: Jobs API - Get specific job by slug
Backend: Partners API (8 partners returned)
Backend: Memberships API (4 memberships returned)
Backend: PDF download endpoint (returns PDF file)
Backend: Contact form submission (200)
Backend: Career inquiry submission (200)
Backend: Job application submission (200)
Frontend: Homepage loads successfully on desktop (1920x1080)
Frontend: Hero section with 3-slide carousel visible
Frontend: Carousel manual navigation (dots clickable)
Frontend: Carousel auto-rotation (6 seconds interval)
Frontend: Hero CTA buttons (Discover Us, Company Profile PDF)
Frontend: Statistics section with animated counters
Frontend: About section visible
Frontend: All 5 commodity cards present and clickable
Frontend: All 4 differentiator cards with hover effects

Frontend: About Us dropdown menu with mega-menu style
Frontend: Our Commodities dropdown menu with mega-menu style
Frontend: Footer with all links (About, Commodities, Company sections)

Frontend: Mobile dropdown menus functional

Frontend: Navigation routing - Who We Are page
